title: Keep Your Pets Warm Indoors
description: Ensure your pets have a warm and cozy area inside your home during cold months.

title: Moisturize Their Paws
description: Use pet-safe paw balms to prevent cracking or dryness from cold and ice.

title: Dress Appropriately
description: Small and short-haired pets may need sweaters or jackets during outdoor walks.

title: Limit Outdoor Time
description: Avoid keeping pets outside for too long during freezing temperatures.

title: Check for Hypothermia
description: Monitor pets for shivering, lethargy, or cold extremities; act quickly if noticed.

title: Winter Diet & Hydration
description: Ensure pets eat well and have fresh water to maintain energy and warmth.
